description: This Python source file defines database connection setup and teardown functions for a PostgreSQL database using SQLAlchemy's asynchronous API. It includes a data class to hold engine and sessionmaker instances, functions to build the database connection string, connect to the database, and close the connection.

classes.name: PostgresState
classes.description: Holds PostgreSQL async engine and sessionmaker for the lifespan of the application.

methods.name: str _build_postgres_dsn()
methods.description: Constructs the async SQLAlchemy Data Source Name (DSN) from configuration settings.

methods.name: PostgresState connect_to_postgres()
methods.description: Establishes an async SQLAlchemy engine and sessionmaker connected to PostgreSQL.

methods.name: None close_postgres(state: PostgresState)
methods.description: Closes the SQLAlchemy engine asynchronously, disposing of the database connection.
